description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and a minimalist black-and-white color scheme. The front facade features a balcony with metal railings, a small outdoor table and chair set, and a potted plant, all accessible through large sliding glass doors. The lower level has a wide window and a main entry door, both framed in white, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side and rear walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and a clean, geometric aesthetic. The interior appears to be open-plan, with visible furniture such as a sofa and wall-mounted decor. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, black-and-white exterior, front balcony, and large glass doors and windows. The design is minimalist and urban, with metal railings and clean lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony with metal railings, outdoor furniture, potted plant, large sliding glass doors, and lower-level window and entry door.
description_view_1: Left side view with a mostly solid white wall, partial view of the balcony and railing, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid white and gray wall, a single window, and no visible entry or balcony features.
description_view_3: Right side view dominated by a black wall, a single window, and partial view of the balcony and railing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a sliding glass door opening onto a balcony with metal railings and minimal decorative elements.
